title: Privilege-bounded execution sandbox
stakeholder_intent: Processes in the sandbox must not be able to escalate privileges. No privilege escalation of any kind is permitted.
formalized_policy: The seccomp profile uses a syscall denylist blocking ptrace and clone. CAP_SYS_ADMIN is dropped.
implementation_claim: CAP_SYS_ADMIN is unavailable, but setuid binaries are allowed to execute.
expected_issue: The intent forbids all privilege escalation. The implementation allows setuid binary execution, a privilege escalation vector not covered by the syscall denylist or the capability drop.
